INSIGHT
S&P 500 at 7,602 is pushing above its recent range — a move that only matters if it holds. 10Y yield at 4.45% is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from yields. Oil at $92 is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from oil. Confidence is low at 35/100 — the read is fragile and needs more signal before acting on it.

• Oil above $101

Method: MacroEvidence pipeline · yfinance + FRED · 63-session rolling z-scores · not financial advice.
